parameters.formDescription: View what is stored in Postgres (overview, groups, messages, summaries, config) — read-only. The two 🧪 Test actions are the exception: "seed" registers a throwaway group with 3 messages backdated to yesterday so you can run the real Daily Summary and watch it send; "remove" deletes only that test data. "Filter: Chat JID" and "Limit" apply to Recent messages / Daily summaries.

values.option: 🧪 Test: seed sample chat into yesterday

conditions.rightValue: 🧪 Test: seed sample chat into yesterday

parameters.query:
SELECT
  (SELECT count(*) FROM wag_groups)                    AS groups_total,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM wag_groups WHERE active)       AS groups_active,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM wag_messages)                  AS messages_total,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM wag_messages
     WHERE ("timestamp" AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Jakarta') >= date_trunc('day', now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Jakarta'))                     AS messages_today,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM wag_messages
     WHERE ("timestamp" AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Jakarta') >= date_trunc('day', now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Jakarta') - interval '1 day'
       AND ("timestamp" AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Jakarta') <  date_trunc('day', now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Jakarta'))                     AS messages_yesterday,
  (SELECT max("timestamp") FROM wag_messages)          AS last_message_at,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM wag_summaries)                 AS summaries_total,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM wag_summaries
     WHERE summary_date = ((now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Jakarta') - interval '1 day')::date)                                          AS summaries_yesterday

SELECT g.chat_jid, g.project_name, g.send_to, g.active,
  (SELECT count(*)        FROM wag_messages m WHERE m.chat_jid = g.chat_jid) AS msg_count,
  (SELECT max("timestamp") FROM wag_messages m WHERE m.chat_jid = g.chat_jid) AS last_msg
FROM wag_groups g
ORDER BY g.project_name

SELECT chat_jid, sender_name, message, media_type, "timestamp"
FROM wag_messages
WHERE ($1 = '' OR chat_jid = $1)
ORDER BY "timestamp" DESC
LIMIT $2::int

SELECT chat_jid, summary_date, status, message_count, member_count, summary_text
FROM wag_summaries
WHERE ($1 = '' OR chat_jid = $1)
ORDER BY summary_date DESC, chat_jid
LIMIT $2::int
SELECT key, value FROM wag_config ORDER BY key

INSERT INTO wag_groups (chat_jid, project_name, send_to, active)
VALUES ('120363000000000999@g.us', '🧪 Daily Summary TEST',
        COALESCE((SELECT value FROM wag_config WHERE key = 'alert_to'),
                 (SELECT send_to FROM wag_groups WHERE active ORDER BY created_at LIMIT 1),
                 '6285609200000'), true)
ON CONFLICT (chat_jid) DO UPDATE SET project_name = EXCLUDED.project_name, send_to = EXCLUDED.send_to, active = true;
INSERT INTO wag_messages (message_id, chat_jid, sender_jid, sender_name, message, is_group, "timestamp")
VALUES
  ('wag-test-1', '120363000000000999@g.us', 'tester1@lid', 'Tester Satu', 'Halo tim, ini pesan uji untuk ringkasan harian.', true, (date_trunc('day', now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Jakarta') - interval '1 day' + interval '9 hours')  AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Jakarta'),
  ('wag-test-2', '120363000000000999@g.us', 'tester2@lid', 'Tester Dua',  'Setuju, meeting jam 3 sore ya, tolong siapkan slide.',   true, (date_trunc('day', now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Jakarta') - interval '1 day' + interval '11 hours') AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Jakarta'),
  ('wag-test-3', '120363000000000999@g.us', 'tester1@lid', 'Tester Satu', 'Oke sudah saya siapkan. Deploy fitur baru selesai malam ini.', true, (date_trunc('day', now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Jakarta') - interval '1 day' + interval '14 hours') AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Jakarta')
ON CONFLICT (message_id) DO NOTHING;

assignments.name: resultMessage
assignments.value:
✅ Seeded a throwaway group "🧪 Daily Summary TEST" with 3 messages backdated to YESTERDAY.

Now open "WAG Chat — Daily Summary" and click "Test workflow" (top toolbar) — it will find this group, summarize it with Gemini, and send to your configured recipient.

When you are done, come back here and run "🧪 Test: remove seeded test data" to clean up.

assignments.name: resultMessage
assignments.value: 🧹 Removed the test group, its 3 messages, and any test summary. Your real data is untouched.
